title: wc
html:
wc

File Read

The file content is parsed as a sequence of `\x00` separated paths. On error the file content appears in a message.

wc --files0-from /path/to/input-file
excerpt: wc File Read The file content is parsed as a sequence of `\x00` separated paths. On error the file content appears in a message. wc --files0-from /path/to/input-file
